name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic
title: R5: A defining factor of the EvidenceVariable
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4B: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` 0..* `BackboneElement`
*  R4: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` 1..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` as `Equivalent`.
Creating extension because element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` is a content reference and requires an extesion definition.

element.short: R5: A defining factor of the EvidenceVariable
element.comment:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic` as `Equivalent`.
Characteristics can be defined flexibly to accommodate different use cases for membership criteria, ranging from simple codes, all the way to using an expression language to express the criteria.

element.comment:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.linkId` has a context of EvidenceVariable.characteristic based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.linkId` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Label for internal linking
element.definition: Label used for when a characteristic refers to another characteristic.

element.short: R5: description
element.comment: Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.description` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.description` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Need to be able to describe characteristics in natural language so that end users can understand the criteria. Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.description` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.description` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: Natural language description of the characteristic
element.definition: A short, natural language description of the characteristic that could be used to communicate the criteria to an end-user.

element.short: Whether the characteristic is an inclusion criterion or exclusion criterion
element.definition: When true, this characteristic is an exclusion criterion. In other words, not matching this characteristic definition is equivalent to meeting this criterion.
